query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML, spreadAwayBetsPct, spreadAwayMoneyPct, mlAwayBetsPct, totalOverBetsPct, modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore, publishedModel FROM games WHERE sport='NCAAM' AND gameDate='2026-03-22' AND awayTeam IN ('miami_fl','st_johns','ucla','texas_tech','kentucky','tennessee','iowa','utah_st','florida','arizona') ORDER BY id ASC;
